note:
This book would not have been possible without the support of several people. The enthusiastic participation of the contributors to this book was essential. We thank them for
the work and time they devoted to the writing of the chapters and for the thoroughness with which they took into account our editorial and technical comments. The financial
support from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Government of Japan (GOJ) and ICRISAT allowed us to organize the workshop. We thank Dr. Hiroshi Nakano, Team
Leader (GOJ Phase III Project) for allowing the transfer of money from the phase I I I budget to prepare this book. Special thanks go to Mr. S. Saigo, Mr. H. Matsuo, and M r . M. Fukushima for their important role as the First Secretary of Japanese Embassy at New Delhi to bridge the GO] and ICRISAT. The project was financially managed in healthy conditions from the beginning to the end owing to thoughtful administration by the International
Cooperation and Planning Division, Economic Affairs Bureau, the Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries of Japan. We also owe a debt of gratitude to Dr. K. Minami, Director, Environmental Resources Division, JIRCAS, for his valuable suggestions in the editing process. We are indebted to Ms. Y. Ogata and Ms. Y. Maeda, Cultio Cooperation for all the tasks involved in manuscript preparation in the layout and design of the book, and Dr. E.
Whitby and Ms. N. Whitby , Chimera Technologies, for the technical editing of the manuscripts. The secretarial work by Messers R. Narsing Rao, G. Shinde, and Ms S.
Merajunnisa is gratefully acknowledged. Finally, we thank all the staff of GOJ Phase II Project for their technical support.
funders: Japan International Research Center for Agricultural Sciences
International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
title: Roots and nitrogen in cropping systems of the semi-arid tropics. Proceedings of the International Workshop: Dynamics of Roots and Nitrogen in Cropping Systems of the Semi-Arid Tropics, International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT), Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, India, 21-25 November 1994
publisher: Japan International Research Center for Agricultural Sciences
affiliation: Japan International Research Center for Agricultural Sciences(Ibaraki)
